title: OOF grid search RealMLP core versus CatBoost weight
summary: Select the CatBoost correction weight by a small OOF grid instead of a fixed prior.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep RealMLP core and CatBoost predictions fixed. Evaluate a predefined grid of CatBoost weights from 0.02 to 0.15 on OOF AUC, select the best OOF weight, and apply that same fixed weight to test predictions. Report the selected weight.
expected_effect: Find the best correction strength with minimal additional modeling complexity.
risk: Weight search on OOF can overfit small CV differences.
